name: Nuclei

core_modules.name: TEMPLATE_SCANNER
core_modules.title: YAML Template Execution Engine
core_modules.description: Applies community-curated vulnerability templates against target hosts for active service checks, CVEs, and exposures.

scenarios.name: Test Scenarios & Commands
scenarios.script:
# Scan a single URL
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com
# Scan multiple URLs
nuclei -list urls.txt  # File containing targets like testphp.vulnweb.com, juice-shop.herokuapp.com
# Scan with automatic URL formatting
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -automatic-scan
# Scan with all templates
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/
# Scan with specific template
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/cves/2021/CVE-2021-21972.yaml
# Scan with multiple templates - good for testphp.vulnweb.com which has many vulnerabilities
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/cves/,~/.local/nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/
# Exclude templates
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -exclude-templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/fuzzing/
# Scan with templates by severity - testphp.vulnweb.com has many high severity issues
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -severity critical,high
# Scan with templates by tags - testphp.vulnweb.com has SQL injection vulnerabilities
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -tags sqli,xss,lfi
# Use pre-defined workflows
nuclei -target http://wordpress.ob-sec.com -workflows workflows/wordpress-workflow.yaml
# Combine workflows with templates
nuclei -target http://wordpress.ob-sec.com -workflows workflows/wordpress-workflow.yaml -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/
# Multiple workflows - works well on sites with multiple technologies
nuclei -target http://vulnweb.com -workflows workflows/php-workflow.yaml,workflows/general-workflow.yaml
# Scan for common web vulnerabilities
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/
# Specifically scan for XSS vulnerabilities - testphp.vulnweb.com has XSS in search functionality
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com/search.php -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/generic/xss/ -v
# Scan for Local File Inclusion - scanme.sh has LFI vulnerabilities
nuclei -target https://scanme.sh -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/lfi/
# Scan for Remote Code Execution
nuclei -target http://vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/generic/rce/
# Scan for SSRF vulnerabilities - public SSRF lab
nuclei -target https://ssrf-lab.herokuapp.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/generic/ssrf/
# Scan for all CVEs
nuclei -target http://cve.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/cves/
# Scan for specific year CVEs - good for older frameworks
nuclei -target http://wordpress.com.testfire.net -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/cves/2021/
# Scan for specific CVE - Log4j on public test instance
nuclei -target https://log4j-vm.lab.secbot.io -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/cves/2021/CVE-2021-44228.yaml
# Scan for Spring4Shell vulnerability on test instance
nuclei -target https://spring4shell-scan.lab.secbot.io -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/cves/2022/CVE-2022-22965.yaml
# Prioritize recent CVEs on public test site
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/cves/ -severity critical,high -new-templates
# Fingerprint technologies
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/technologies/
# Detect specific technologies - WordPress detection on WP test site
nuclei -target http://wordpress.ob-sec.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/technologies/wordpress-detect.yaml
# Detect Joomla on public test site
nuclei -target https://joomla-test.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/technologies/joomla-detect.yaml
# Scan with request header authentication - JWT test site
nuclei -target https://jwt-test.vulnweb.com/api/ -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -header "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIiwibmFtZSI6IlRlc3QgVXNlciIsImlhdCI6MTUxNjIzOTAyMn0.SflKxwRJSMeKKF2QT4fwpMeJf36POk6yJV_adQssw5c"
# Scan with cookie authentication - demo cookie-based auth site
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com/userinfo.php -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -header "Cookie: login=test%2Ftest"
# Control number of templates executed in parallel
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -concurrency 25
# Define rate limit for HTTP requests - important for public test sites
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -rate-limit 100
# Define max number of HTTP requests per template - reduces load on test sites
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -bulk-size 25
# Control scanning timeout - useful for slow-responding test sites
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -timeout 5
# Add custom headers to all requests - useful for user-agent detection tests
nuclei -target http://testphp.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -header "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36"
# Follow redirects - test site with redirection
nuclei -target http://redirect.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -follow-redirects
# Follow host redirects - domain with multiple redirect chains
nuclei -target http://redirection-test.vulnweb.com -templates ~/.local/nuclei-templates/ -follow-host-redirects

keyTakeaways.title: TEMPLATE_SELECTION
keyTakeaways.content: Use appropriate templates for your target

keyTakeaways.title: RATE_LIMITING
keyTakeaways.content: Control scan speed to avoid overwhelming targets

keyTakeaways.title: OUTPUT_MANAGEMENT
keyTakeaways.content: Save and organize results for analysis

keyTakeaways.title: VALIDATION
keyTakeaways.content: Always validate findings to remove false positives

keyTakeaways.title: UPDATES
keyTakeaways.content: Keep nuclei and templates updated for the latest vulnerability checks

keyTakeaways.title: DESCRIPTION
keyTakeaways.content: Detects a custom vulnerability in target application

attackPaths.title: PERIMETER_PROBING
attackPaths.desc: Pivot internal scan actions targeting the newly resolved endpoints.

scenarios.name: Troubleshooting
objectiveList: Check the template syntax in the mentioned file
scenarios.script:
Try with increased timeout: nuclei -u https://example.com -timeout 10
Enable verbose mode: nuclei -u https://example.com -v
Enable debug mode: nuclei -u https://example.com -debug
Check template execution details: nuclei -u https://example.com -debug-req

keyTakeaways.title: ERROR
keyTakeaways.content: Error parsing template file: yaml: line X: ... Solution:

keyTakeaways.title: ERROR
keyTakeaways.content: could not connect to host Solution:

keyTakeaways.title: ERROR
keyTakeaways.content: Too many requests, rate limiting enabled Solution:

attackPaths.desc: Pivot internal scan actions targeting the newly resolved endpoints.

scenarios.name: Security Considerations
objectiveList: Scanner activity is easily identifiable in target logs
scenarios.script: Use custom User-Agent: nuclei -u https://example.com -header "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0..."

attackPaths.desc: Pivot internal scan actions targeting the newly resolved endpoints.

scenarios.name: References and Additional Resources
scenarios.script:
Basic scan:        nuclei -u https://example.com
Template select:   nuclei -t cves/ -u https://example.com
Output:            nuclei -u https://example.com -o results.txt -json
Rate limiting:     nuclei -u https://example.com -rate-limit 100

attackPaths.desc: Pivot internal scan actions targeting the newly resolved endpoints.

troubleshooting.cause: Internet connection blocked or firewall blocking GitHub template downloads.
troubleshooting.resolution: Manually download and extract the template directory.

security: Ensure all execution requests with Nuclei are performed within authorized scope. Log all output artifacts securely and protect the integrity of local credential wordlists.
